Text.Page:
Northeast of here you'll see the flag of the Free Brotherhood.

Bring it to me, and I'll see to it that it goes up in flames.

It's only a symbolic gesture, but until we can bring the brotherhood to justice, that's all we have.
(Little remains of this blood-stained flag but remnants.)
The Free Brotherhood has much blood on its hands. We'll remember their victims as we destroy their flag.
